title: ektrepo #1624
definition:
1) to turn or twist out
    1a) in a medical sense used of dislocated limbs
 2) to turn off or aside
 3) to be turned aside
 4) to turn aside
 5) to turn away from, to shun a thing, to avoid meeting or
    associating with one
